message:
fix: const fn promotions, eliminate gossip config clone, early mutex drop, doc lint

Six small code quality improvements across connectors and core crates:

airtable/client.rs, figma/client.rs:
- Promote with_retry_config() to const fn — the method only assigns
  primitive fields (u32, u64) on self, so it can be evaluated at
  compile time for static configurations.

fcp-mesh/gossip.rs:
- Eliminate unnecessary config.clone() in get_or_create_zone(). The old
  comment claimed mutable borrow of self.zone_states conflicted with
  immutable borrow of self.config, but Rust allows borrowing disjoint
  struct fields simultaneously. Replace the clone with a direct
  &self.config reference by extracting it before the entry() call.
  Updated doc comment to explain the disjoint borrow pattern.

fcp-ratelimit/sliding_window.rs:
- Add explicit drop(timestamps) after cleanup_locked() and len
  extraction in remaining(). The MutexGuard was held across the final
  saturating_sub() which doesn't need the lock — dropping it early
  reduces contention under concurrent rate limit checks.

fcp-store/coverage.rs:
- Promote max_node_symbols() to const fn — it returns a cached u32
  field with no runtime computation.

fcp-store/gc.rs:
- Fix doc comment: HashSet → `HashSet` (backtick-quoted) to satisfy
  clippy doc_markdown lint.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -136,7 +136,7 @@ impl AirtableClient {
 
     /// Set retry configuration.
     #[must_use]
-    pub fn with_retry_config(
+    pub const fn with_retry_config(
         mut self,
         max_retries: u32,
         initial_delay_ms: u64,

@@ -157,7 +157,7 @@ impl FigmaClient {
 
     /// Set retry configuration.
     #[must_use]
-    pub fn with_retry_config(
+    pub const fn with_retry_config(
         mut self,
         max_retries: u32,
         initial_delay_ms: u64,
